_comment: Fresh 5-star Google review excerpts shown on the homepage. OVERWRITTEN WEEKLY by the n8n 'Grooming Reviews Rotator' workflow (see HANDOVER) — do not hand-edit except to fix an emergency. Excerpts are verbatim contiguous fragments of real reviews (ellipsis = truncated), author-attributed, from the salon's own Google Business Profile. Seeded from the 2026-07-12 harvest of the old site's live reviews widget.

reviews.author: Sarah Griffiths
reviews.text: I used Fairy Tails for the first time this week. I couldn't be happier with the results. My dogs were brought back looking beautiful and smelling wonderful. I'll definitely be using this service again!

reviews.author: Sharon Terrell
reviews.text: I booked my two little dogs in for a groom and arranged for them to be collected and returned to me...... Well, from start to finish a very professional service. Great care was taken and they were groomed exactly as I had requested, both…

reviews.author: Mollie Taylor
reviews.text: The lovely people at the fairy tails grooming are so amazing and caring towards all the animals. My crazy caramel has been going there for her groom around 2 years now and she loves them all. My dog is such a people pleaser and loves…

reviews.author: stella dunn
reviews.text: Darcy had her summer groom yesterday and what a difference it makes to her.. she looks younger and so cute. As always, the team did a fab job on her and looked after her well at a very reasonable price. I still wouldn't take her anywhere…
